p1_subtitle: A journey from fake smiles to real love.
p2_subtitle: You're not perfect, but you're perfect for me.

like_cards.title: Your Smile
like_cards.desc: The way your smile brightens my darkest days.

like_cards.title: Your Personality
like_cards.desc: You are kind, caring and so beautiful inside out.

like_cards.title: The Way You Care
like_cards.desc: You always understand me without me saying anything.

like_cards.title: The Way You Understand Me
like_cards.desc: You are the most special person in my life.

p3_letter:
Every moment with you feels like a dream come true. You are not just someone I love, you are someone I can't live without. You mean the world to me and my heart belongs to you.

You are my today and all of my tomorrows.

I promise to love you, care for you, respect you and always stand by you.
p4_subtitle: Beautiful snapshots of our journey together.

memories.title: Our First Chat
memories.desc: That random 'Hi' was the best 'Hi' of my life. ❤️

memories.title: Our First Call
memories.desc: I could talk to you for hours and still not get bored. ❤️

memories.title: Our Funniest Moment
memories.desc: The inside jokes that only you and I understand. 😂

memories.title: The Day I Realized I Like You
memories.desc: The exact moment when everything changed. 🥺❤️

p5_title: Changes In My Life When You Came ❤️

changes.title: You Gave Me Happiness
changes.desc: You are the reason for my happiness.

promises: I will always stay honest with you.
I will never stop choosing you.
I will never let you feel alone.
p7_question: Will You Be My Official Real Girlfriend? ❤️
p8_subtitle: Now Our Relationship Is Properly Official 😌❤️
p8_final_message: Aaj Se Tum Sirf Meri Favourite Person Nahi, Meri Official Girlfriend Bhi Ho ❤️🥺
p9_text1:
"This Is Not Just A Website...
It's A Piece Of My Heart For You ❤️"
p9_text2:
